name: Cloudflare Registrar
description: List, inspect, and manage domains registered through Cloudflare. Configure DNS records (A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, NS, SRV, CAA), update registrar settings (auto-renew, lock, privacy), and initiate domain transfers to Cloudflare via the Cloudflare API v4.
features: List all domains registered via Cloudflare Registrar
Get detailed domain info (expiry, auto-renew, privacy, registrar status)
Full DNS record management (A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, NS, SRV, CAA)
Update registrar settings (auto-renew, lock, WHOIS privacy)
